source.module: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

topicTags: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

content.problemStatement:
### Which of the following best describes a relative URL in Django? 


1. A URL that includes the full domain name (e.g., `https://example.com/profile/`)

2. A URL that is written relative to the current page or application (e.g., `about/`)

3. A URL that is dynamically generated using Python functions

3. A URL that always starts with '/' to indicate the root of the site
